factionAbilities.name: STALL TACTICS
factionAbilities.effect: ACTION: Discard 1 action card from your hand.

factionAbilities.name: SCHEMING
factionAbilities.effect: When you draw 1 or more action cards, draw 1 additional action card. Then, choose and discard 1 action card from your hand.

factionAbilities.name: CRAFTY
factionAbilities.effect: You can have any number of action cards in your hand. Game effects cannot prevent you from using this ability.

versions.timing: At the start of your turn:
versions.effect: Look at the Yssaril player's hand of action cards. Choose 1 of those cards and add it to your hand. Then, return this card to the Yssaril player.

factionTechnologies.name: Transparasteel Plating
factionTechnologies.effect: During your turn of the action phase, players that have passed cannot play action cards.

factionTechnologies.name: Mageon Implants
factionTechnologies.effect: ACTION: Exhaust this card to look at another player's hand of action cards. Choose 1 of those cards and add it to your hand.

abilities.name: Move Through
abilities.effect: This ship can move through systems that contain other players' ships.

mech.name: Blackshade Infiltrator
mech.deploy: After you use your STALL TACTICS faction ability, you may place 1 mech on a planet you control.

synergy.description: Tus tecnologías amarillas pueden usarse como verdes para prerrequisitos, y viceversa (no ambas a la vez).

ability.name: Deepgloom Executable
ability.effect: You can allow other players to use your STALL TACTICS or SCHEMING faction abilities; when you do, you may resolve a transaction with that player. During the action phase, that transaction does not count against the once-per-player transactions limit for that turn.

agent.name: Ssruu
agent.ability: This card has the text ability of each other player's agent, even if that agent is exhausted.

commander.name: So Ata
commander.ability: After another player activates a system that contains your units: You may look at that player's action cards, promissory notes, or secret objectives.

hero.name: Kyver, Blade and Key
hero.ability: GUILD OF SPIES — ACTION: Each other player shows you 1 action card from their hand. For each player, you may either take that card or force that player to discard 3 random action cards from their hand. Then, purge this card.
